projects.title: This Is Me
projects.summary: A global, employee-led series of short films telling real stories across markets — from Harlem to Tokyo. Corrine held the visual direction end to end, keeping a cohesive, on-brand look across very different people, places and lighting.
bullets: Oversaw visual direction across all markets

projects.title: Apple Watch
projects.summary: Paid social and video campaign built around the Apple Watch — directing the visual language from quiet morning routines through to outdoor movement, and making the styling and creative calls live on set.
bullets: Set styling and creative decisions on set

projects.title: Whatever Your Personality
projects.summary: A multi-format campaign showing technology slotting naturally into real home life, running across social, web and out-of-home. Corrine directed the look and made the styling and set decisions in the moment.
bullets: Directed the look across social, web and OOH

projects.title: Off to Uni
projects.summary: A back-to-university campaign spanning social, web and OOH. The brief was warmth and usefulness — Corrine kept the visual direction consistent and on-brand across every format.
bullets: Held visual direction across all formats

projects.title: Matthew Williamson — Live Launch
projects.summary: A live product launch with designer Matthew Williamson. Corrine oversaw the visual direction and on-set styling, advising on how the collection should be portrayed and keeping the broadcast on-brand throughout.
bullets: Visual direction for a live broadcast
Advised on how to portray the collection

projects.title: Tinted Lip Campaign
projects.summary: A beauty campaign for Benefit's tinted lip range, with John Lewis. Corrine directed the visual outcome with the client and made the styling and prop calls to land a bright, cohesive, on-brand result.
bullets: Directed the visual outcome with the client

projects.title: Beauty Launches
projects.summary: Beauty launch content for Burberry and L'Oréal, with John Lewis. Corrine oversaw the visual direction and styling, keeping every element cohesive and on-brand from concept through to capture.

projects.title: ASMR Baking Series
projects.summary: A festive ASMR baking series — a tactile, sound-led world of cakes, tables and textures. Corrine art-directed each scene to feel rich, warm and unmistakably on-brand.

projects.title: Summer with Gok Wan
projects.summary: A live summer showcase with Gok Wan for the ANYDAY range. Corrine designed and oversaw the set build, directed the visual look, and made the styling decisions on set across the broadcast.
bullets: Designed and oversaw the set build

projects.title: Kat Farmer & Louise Roe
projects.summary: Seasonal live fashion edits with stylists Kat Farmer and Louise Roe. Corrine directed the visual look, sourced props and clothing, and kept each segment cohesive and on-brand.
bullets: Directed the visual look for seasonal edits

projects.title: A/W with Erica Davies
projects.summary: Autumn/winter live fashion content with Erica Davies, plus an 'Off to Uni' edit with Kat Farmer. Corrine oversaw the visual direction and styling, advising on how the season's pieces should read on camera.
bullets: Advised on how pieces read on camera

projects.title: Brand Campaign
projects.summary: Food art direction for the Raasa brand — composing warm, appetising tablescapes that hold together across formats. Corrine directed the visual outcome, sourced props and dressed every scene on brand.

projects.title: Brand Campaign
projects.summary: Brand campaign art direction for Joyful, including seasonal moments. Corrine directed a bright, characterful visual language and made the styling and set calls to keep it cohesive and on-brand.

projects.title: Fred Perry × Paul Smith
projects.summary: Menswear e-commerce styling across two heritage brands, Fred Perry and Paul Smith. Corrine dressed full look ranges for studio capture with tight turnarounds and a consistent commercial finish.
bullets: Styled full look ranges for two heritage brands

projects.title: Lorraine & Riddiculous
projects.summary: Weekly presenter and guest styling for daytime broadcast across The Lorraine Show and Riddiculous. Corrine built brand relationships to lend and gift clothing, sourced and collated weekly fashion features, and advised talent — all to budget.
bullets: Built brand relationships to lend / gift clothing
Sourced and collated weekly fashion features

projects.title: Alan Carr & Maya Jama
projects.summary: Celebrity styling for a live charity broadcast, dressing hosts including Alan Carr and Maya Jama. Corrine sourced costume and made styling calls on set, managing assistants and budget across a high-pressure live show.
bullets: Styling and creative decisions on set

projects.title: The Jokes On You
projects.summary: Character costume design, making and continuity for a hidden-camera prank format — disguises convincing enough to fool the public, then kept consistent across multiple shoot days and locations.

projects.title: Matt Lucas & Elis James
projects.summary: Costume design for an entertainment format hosted by Matt Lucas and Elis James. Corrine liaised with talent and producers, made styling and creative decisions on set, and managed sourcing and budget.
bullets: Styling and creative decisions on set

settings.aboutLede: I'm Corrine Kaenzig — a freelance stylist and art director focused on set styling and brand visual identity.
aboutBody: After thirteen years in film and television, across both styling and costume, innovation and a sharp eye for detail now drive my art direction work — built over the last five years.

I believe the work should be concept-driven, with impact that lasts. Strategic, empathic, daring and playful, the goal is to spark genuine curiosity rather than just please the eye. Decisive planning and close client consultation keep the brand vision intact from first meeting to final delivery — on target and on budget.

services.title: Art Direction
services.description: Visual direction and on-set creative for campaigns across broadcast, social, web and out-of-home.

services.title: Fashion Styling
services.description: Editorial, e-commerce and presenter styling — sourcing, brand liaison and on-set decisions.

services.title: Costume Design
services.description: Character costume, making and continuity for film and television formats.

services.title: Set Dressing
services.description: Building and dressing sets, sourcing props and composing scenes that hold across formats.

services.title: Consulting
services.description: Translating brand objectives into clear visual outcomes, on time and on budget.
